dict.string: SUBQUERY(extensionItems, $item, SUBQUERY($item.attachments, $att, ANY $att.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.adobe.pdf" OR ANY $att.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.image" OR ANY $att.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.idpf.epub-container" OR ANY $att.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.html" OR ANY $att.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "net.daringfireball.markdown" OR ANY $att.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.url").@count > 0).@count > 0
